hero.sub: One platform for restaurants, marts, and retail shops. POS, inventory, staff, and reports — all in one place.

restaurant_pos.title: Scan, order
restaurant_pos.sub: Customers scan a QR code to view the menu and place orders directly from their phone. No waiting, no confusion — fast and easy ordering at the table.
restaurant_pos.f1: QR code scan to access menu instantly
restaurant_pos.f4: Reduce wait time and staff workload

mart_pos.title: Sell by unit, pack, or box
mart_pos.sub: Multi-unit pricing out of the box. Sell a single can or a case of 24 — stock deducts correctly in base units every time.
mart_pos.f1: Multi-unit: can, pack, box, carton, kg
mart_pos.f4: Stock auto-deducts in base units on every sale

inventory.title: Always know what's in stock
inventory.sub: Purchase orders, stock movements, adjustments, and low-stock alerts keep your shelves full and numbers accurate.

features.title: More than just a POS
features.sales_desc: Revenue charts, top products, payment breakdown, daily/weekly/monthly.
features.staff_desc: Role-based access: owner, admin, cashier, staff.
features.branch_desc: Run multiple branches. Each has its own stock and staff.
features.perf_desc: Best sellers vs slow movers. Know what to push and cut.
features.supplier_desc: Track purchase history and spending per supplier.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.sub: Join businesses across Cambodia already using SmartStore.

hero.sub: Customers scan a QR code on the table and browse your full menu — in Khmer or English. No app download needed.

how.title: 3 simple steps
how.sub: No technical setup required. Ready in minutes.

s1.title: Print your QR code
s1.desc: Generate a unique QR for each table and print it out.

s2.title: Customer scans
s2.desc: They open the menu instantly on their phone — no app, no login.

s3.title: Order sent to kitchen
s3.desc: Their order goes straight to your POS and kitchen display.

f1.title: Show your food at its best
f1.desc: High-quality food photos, descriptions, prices, and category filters — all optimised for mobile.

f2.title: Order directly from the table
f2.desc: Customers add items, choose options, and send their order — it goes straight to your kitchen and POS system.

f3.title: Khmer & English, side by side
f3.desc: Your menu displays in both Khmer and English. Customers switch language with one tap — local or tourist, everyone feels welcome.

qr.title: QR Code Per Table
qr.desc: Unique QR for every table. Customers go directly to that table's order.

photo.title: Food Photography
photo.desc: Upload beautiful food photos to make every dish look irresistible.

lang.title: Khmer + English
lang.desc: Full bilingual menu. One tap to switch — no reload needed.

mod.title: Item Modifiers
mod.desc: Let customers choose: small/large, spicy/mild, toppings and extras.

live.title: Live Menu Updates
live.desc: Mark items as sold out in real time. Customers always see current availability.

mobile.title: Mobile Optimised
mobile.desc: Designed for phones. Fast, smooth, and beautiful on any screen size.

cta.title: Ready to go digital?
cta.sub: Add eMenu to your restaurant today. Setup takes less than 1 minute.
